product_purpose.long_term_outcome: Provide a local-first, evidence-centered Chinese labor-dispute casework system for source-governed legal verification, claim analysis, deterministic calculations, traceable documents, human review, and quality gates.
product_purpose.current_release_job: Validate a bounded local reference-integrity package before handing it to an external legal review workflow.
product_purpose.primary_use_moment: After local materials have been collected or structured, but before relying on legal analysis, amounts, deadlines, or filing documents.
product_purpose.primary_output: A reproducible technical handoff package: observed-byte manifest, local content-addressed workspace, locked v1.3 case package, governed source artifacts, and deterministic validation reports.
product_purpose.success_condition: A reviewer can reproduce the bytes, references, and snapshots used; relevant changes require revalidation; unverified legal properties remain visible.

capabilities.guarantee: Records stable path/content IDs, size and SHA-256 for bytes read from stable opened regular-file descriptors, then verifies a second complete tree walk within configured bounds.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: A filesystem-atomic snapshot, authenticity, semantic meaning, later immutability, malware safety, or completeness outside the scanned tree.

capabilities.guarantee: Separates unattested system observations, unavailable user provenance, generator/runtime metadata, output-permission status, and manifest self-hash.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Generator authenticity, operator identity, timestamp trust, Windows ACL enforcement, or evidence provenance.

capabilities.guarantee: Re-reads v1.3 intake sources, requires unchanged size and SHA-256, copies bytes into a deduplicated content-addressed local store, marks objects read-only, rejects unsafe paths and tree overlap, and replay-validates migrated or restored object sets.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Evidence authenticity, at-rest encryption, trusted filesystem ownership or Windows ACLs, backup durability, semantic safety, or source provenance.

capabilities.guarantee: Reports byte-prefix media-type hints, extension mismatches, duplicate-content groups, and hardlink candidates without executing content.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Complete format validation, safe content, semantic parsing, or authenticity.

capabilities.guarantee: Revalidates an immutable workspace object, invokes a stdlib-only isolated Python child through bounded JSON, enforces wall-time/source/output/archive limits, refuses unsafe archive paths, XML declarations, OOXML macros and external relationships, and binds every candidate anchor to exact text and source snapshots.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: An operating-system sandbox, malware freedom, evidence authenticity, visual rendering equivalence, legal relevance, semantic support, or safety of future third-party parser engines.

capabilities.guarantee: Checks required v1.3 fields, supported values, bounded JSON input, and deterministic error output.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Truth of any field value or legal sufficiency.

capabilities.guarantee: Checks stable identifiers, cross-references, raw-file manifest equality, RFC 8785 snapshot hashes, manifest self-hash, statement snapshot, and requested-state binding.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Evidence support, legal applicability, or document correctness.

capabilities.guarantee: Recomputes SUM_DECIMAL_INPUTS_V1 using decimal strings and ROUND_HALF_UP_2.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: A labor-law formula, correct wage base, correct period, cap, remedy, tax treatment, or non-duplication.

capabilities.guarantee: Loads a schema-validated publisher registry and requires exact HTTPS hosts that match the declared publisher and purpose.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: URL availability, publisher authorship, page contents, currentness, amendment history, exact quotation, automated-access authorization, or case applicability.

capabilities.guarantee: Validates versioned rule, claim, and calculator review-packet structures, official-source candidate references, declared version-bound rule dependencies, review-question subject paths, RFC 8785 subject and packet snapshots, and self-declared cross-validation record consistency.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Existence or contents of external rule packets, source content or currentness, legal correctness, reviewer identity or qualification, professional approval, or submission readiness.

capabilities.guarantee: Validates formal-output state-request structure, RFC 8785 request snapshots, same-artifact previous bindings, declared dependency changes, legal-freshness check bindings, transition shape, and fail-closed draft downgrade requirements.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Dependency snapshot authenticity, existence of the declared previous request, legal currentness or correctness, reviewer identity, approval, REVIEW_REQUIRED eligibility, or submission readiness.

capabilities.guarantee: Requires a typed, non-empty location and a reference to an observed raw file.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: That the location exists, the cited passage was extracted correctly, or the evidence supports the fact.

capabilities.guarantee: Requires per-claim limitation fields and evidence references.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Any deadline or within/outside conclusion; those fields must remain UNVERIFIED.

capabilities.guarantee: Links declared claim elements to fact, evidence, rule, and calculation identifiers.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: A complete claim-element catalog, burden allocation, legal sufficiency, or remedy compatibility.

capabilities.guarantee: Performs one explicit read-only HTTPS GET with TLS 1.2+, public-peer checks, bounded same-publisher redirects, identity encoding, media/size/time limits, content-addressed response-body storage, selected response/TLS metadata, and offline replay validation; structurally binds unverified version relationships.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Raw HTTP framing, clock attestation, automated-access authorization, publisher authorship, legal currentness, relationship legal correctness, case applicability, or scheduled monitoring.

capabilities.guarantee: Validates bounded candidate version graphs, internal references, acyclic amendment-like edges, exact UTF-8 source hashes, unnormalized line operations, complete non-truncated diff records, and RFC 8785 graph and diff snapshots.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Correct extraction from HTML or PDF, legal correctness of a relationship, legal effect of a textual change, publisher authorship, or currentness.

capabilities.guarantee: Compares bound frozen response-body hashes, enforces a technical maximum age, records unavailable, changed, stale, or unchanged candidate status, and forces draft-only output on failure states.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Scheduled execution, alert delivery, legal currentness, completeness of all amending instruments, publisher authorship, or submission eligibility.

capabilities.guarantee: Selects zero, one, or multiple version candidates whose declared effective intervals contain an ISO event date in the exact graph jurisdiction, and binds the graph and selection snapshots.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Legal applicability, retroactivity, special transitional rules, relationship correctness, or independent legal approval.

capabilities.guarantee: Restricts collection to one explicit OFFICIAL_CASE URL, persists a fail-closed per-publisher minimum-interval reservation, freezes content and transport metadata, and creates versioned controlled classification metadata with redistribution blocked.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Automated-access authorization, privacy or reuse permission, completeness of public cases, legal correctness of classification, case holdings, or suitability as a complete-case evaluation corpus.

capabilities.guarantee: Extracts bounded structural candidates from UTF-8 text, CSV, DOCX, XLSX and plain-text email, and inspects ZIP entry names without extraction; spreadsheet formulas remain inert text.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: PDF extraction, OCR, image/audio/video transcription, attachment recursion, visual page anchors, semantic facts, evidence support, or human-confirmed locations.

capabilities.guarantee: Provides hashed dependency locks, runtime vulnerability audit, reproducible CycloneDX SBOM, commit-pinned Actions, and GitHub Tag artifact provenance workflow.
capabilities.does_not_guarantee: Authenticity of a locally generated intake manifest or trust in a compromised GitHub/PyPI root of trust.
